title: Sussodia oppositifolia

intro: Sussodia oppositifolia, commonly known as Licorice Root, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its long, slender roots and opposite leaves. The health benefits of Sussodia oppositifolia include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and combat respiratory infections.
